full.file_describe:
New Features
1. Added a Model Library section, allowing you to download 3MF files and start print jobs directly online.
2. Added new official material types.
3. Added color options for third-party materials.

Bug Fixes
1. Fixed an issue where the software crashed when printing with filaments that use a transparent channel.
2. Fixed occasional lag in certain HTTP requests.
3. Fixed abnormal page redirection when switching, adding, or removing printer models.
4. Fixed an issue where U1 disconnected in LAN mode.

Improvements
1. Corrected the name of Polymaker filaments.
